ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user account */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of user account (e.g., individual, organization) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stream_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality record */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream being monitored */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quality record */,
  "quality_type" TEXT /* Type of quality metric (e.g., video, audio) */,
  "quality_rating" REAL /* Rating of the stream quality (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "stream_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stream being rated */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Optional comment provided by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id")
)
